responsibilities: Lead end-to-end client engagements, owning overall project scope, timeline, budget, and quality of final deliverables
Manage and mentor teams of consultants and analysts, providing guidance on analytical approach and professional development
Build and sustain senior client relationships, identifying opportunities to expand engagement scope and drive follow-on work
Develop and present strategic recommendations to C-suite executives and boards, translating complex analysis into clear narratives
Oversee development of financial models and business cases that quantify the impact of proposed strategic initiatives
Contribute to business development efforts including proposal writing, client pitches, and scoping of new engagements
Drive organizational change initiatives by designing implementation plans and managing client-side stakeholder buy-in
Identify and resolve engagement risks proactively, escalating issues and ensuring alignment with partner and client expectations
